channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: The Persistent Display We Never Got - Hackaday
item.description: The Persistent Display We Never Got  Hackaday

item.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved really, really wants you to know you can get a physical disc even if you buy it on PS5 - Eurogamer.net
item.description:
1. Halo: Campaign Evolved really, really wants you to know you can get a physical disc even if you buy it on PS5  Eurogamer.net
  2. July Community Q&A | Halo: Campaign Evolved | Halo - Official Site (en)  Halo Waypoint
  3. Halo: Campaign Evolved is doing something that GTA 6 isn't  Polygon.com
  4. After Sony Kills PS5 Discs and GTA 6 is Just a Code in a Box, Xbox Is Using Halo: Campaign Evolved's Physical Disc as a Selling Point  IGN
  5. Microsoft confirms Halo discs: PS5 gets a boxed edition  en.softonic.com

item.title: It's Official, Shantae's Seventh Game Will Arrive In 2027 - Nintendo Life
item.description:
1. It's Official, Shantae's Seventh Game Will Arrive In 2027  Nintendo Life
  2. WayForward announces next Shantae game at Anime Expo with 2027 release window  Video Games Chronicle
  3. WayForward Confirms New Shantae Game Is in Development, Shares First Teaser Artwork  TwistedVoxel
  4. Nintendo Game Boy Color Series Officially Returning With New Game in 2027  ComicBook.com
  5. WayForward says new Shantae game coming in 2027  My Nintendo News

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — here's how to claim - Mashable
item.description: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — here's how to claim  Mashable
